scope: static bridge from magic-danmaku REQUEST_REPORT producer to detail-page DANMAKU_REPORT consumer and report iframe attachIframe sink

static_chain.role: detail bundle loads the magic-danmaku plugin and forwards its REQUEST_REPORT event into the detail-page player event bus
current live magic-danmaku REPORT click producer emits REQUEST_REPORT with id only
detail-page DANMAKU_REPORT consumer expects targetId on incoming data and forwards it as targetid to the report popup
report popup attachIframe serializes object keys verbatim into the iframe query string

current_judgment: The current live magic-danmaku REPORT-click producer and the immediate REQUEST_REPORT -> Bt.DANMAKU_REPORT forwarder do not statically populate targetId/targetid/commentid.

The downstream DANMAKU_REPORT consumer does expect b.data.targetId, so the current static chain contains a shape discontinuity: sink expects targetId, while the currently observed producer path only emits id.
This makes the known runtime clue root.base.commentInfo.targetid harder to explain through the currently observed REPORT-click producer path.

If the current producer path reached attachIframe unchanged, the popup URL would only include targetid when the caller actually places that key in the object; if the key is present with undefined, it would serialize as targetid=undefined.
open_questions: Whether a different lazy-loaded DANMAKU_REPORT producer populates targetId on current or other environments.
Whether the attachIframe(5,{id,targetid}) sink is usually driven by a path outside the currently observed REQUEST_REPORT click producer.
Whether comment/community-side commentInfo.targetid/commentid are permanently disjoint from the active dokiid/ftid chain and from the report-popup path.
